\small
\textbf{Note.} Grids: $n_1=128$, $n_2=64$, $n_3=32$ elements; refinement ratio $r=2$; safety factor $F_s=1.25$ (three-grid): we use the standard three-grid GCI formula, and the factor 1.25 is the one recommended for that case. $\phi_1$ = fine-grid solution; $p$ = apparent order ($p_\mathrm{th}=2$). $\Delta(\phi_1,\mathrm{Roark}) = 100(\phi_1-\mathrm{Roark})/\mathrm{Roark}$; $\phi_\mathrm{rich}$ = Richardson extrapolate. GCI$_{23}$/GCI$_{12}$ $\approx r^p$ in asymptotic range.
